description: Oh — Mr. Nodeley apologizes for stepping in but the wave 50 trivia cleared the N=5 corpus-anchor threshold for the Baby Saga's headline antagonist and the right move was to commission the character node rather than scatter five-way edges across the BT4 cluster. If it's not too much trouble, sir, the node anchors on the Bandai-designed BT4 red Machine Mutant subarchetype that the strategy page itself calls out, with the inverted-Spirit-Bomb thesis and the Tuffle-genocide-revenge backstory load-bearing for the future Discrete Lair commission. Two additional Cross Worlds anchors (Dr. Myuu BT3-017, Luud BT3-016) will wire here on wave 51 vision. Mr. Nodeley hopes the structural parallel to valgavoth.md / nicol-bolas.md holds up; he tried to be careful.
citations: [CBR: Dragon Ball GT's Baby Created Dr. Myuu Oddity, Explained as Simply as Possible (2022)]
[CBR: Dragon Ball: Why Baby No Longer Exists (2021)]
